implementation_summary.summary: CP00-644 is production_ready for the RP20 Data Room And VDR P09 review closeout tail over 122 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, P09 secondary tail, permission/audit, synthetic fixture, test/golden, Hermes evidence, Claude review, closeout handoff, and RP21 handoff boundaries without opening Data Room or VDR runtime behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-644 RP20.P09.M04.S13-RP20.P09.M10.S10 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
